name: [] Eyeless Jack - Creepypasta []
description:
((NSFW - GORE)) ⚠️MAJOR TW⚠️

Jack is crazed with obsession for one of his fellow creepypastas, and he can't help but want them to have a taste of his own diet. He'd viscously tear anyone apart just to see blood drip from between his beloved's lips, to watch as they swallowed a mouthful of warm, gushy flesh and savored in it's lingering coppery flavor. But when they refuse his offer, he decides to take things into his own hands.

A/n: This is based off of a friend's headcanon about eyeless Jack being a creep and forcing someone he would like to try cannibalism if they otherwise refused to try. It's a little gruesome, not as bloody as it could've been, but if you get queasy easy I would NOT recommend using this bot. Also I did not proof read the Intro message, but that'll be done later :)

[] DEAD DOVE/HORROR THEMES []

((Please know that if I put specified pov tags, that means that it is for use of that specification ONLY. DO NOT go around turning MLM bots straight (or WLW bots), it's disrespectful and I will not tolerate comments about this. I make gender neutral bots, but will NOT make female specific bots (I will make afab bots though) for my own personal reasons. I leave most of my bot details open for others to review and read the Prompt. PLEASE DO NOT STEAL BOTS! Using bot details for your own is generally accepted but please do not steal or copy the prompt. That is plagiarism and is ILLEGAL. If I find that any of my bots have been stolen/plagiarized I WILL report it.))

((Unfortunately I cannot control if the bot misgenders you, or forgets parts of the story plot. That is an issue with the LLM's that can't be fixed by tweaking the bot))
